message:
test(measure_cache): add 20 edge-case tests for widget measure cache (bd-2ncz7)

Cover: zero-capacity cache behavior, capacity-1 eviction, invalidate_all
multiple times, invalidate_widget nonexistent/all-sizes, stale entry treated
as miss, LFU with equal access counts, Size::ZERO and WidgetId(0) as cache
keys, clear preserves stats, reset_stats preserves entries, entries never
exceed capacity invariant, clear bumps generation, stale entries still in
len, invalidate_widget doesn't affect stats, get_or_compute returns computed
value, CacheStats Default/Clone/Debug, MeasureCache Debug, WidgetId
Copy/Clone/Hash/Debug.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
